◎简　　介  

　　Alex (Frédéric Siuen), a thirty-something man of Chinese descent, lives the typical carefree life of his generation with his girlfriend Eloane (Audrey Bastien). After his brother's sudden death, he returns to his family in the Chinese area of Paris. The rites and traditions he is unable to follow reveal the full extent of his estrangement from his father's heritage (Bing Yin). ...
